title: (Bearish Signal) SGRY, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling SGRY's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. A.I. dvisor identified 52 similar cases where SGRY's MACD histogram became negative, and 43 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $43.37 crossed the support line at $42.58 and is trading between $44.41 resistance and $42.58 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/04/21 - 04/06/21, the price experienced a +15% Uptrend. During the week of 03/29/21 - 04/06/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ixbyqm1mlrr61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=0c36e512bc67c1300e30bc2245c817125ef0851f

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for SGRY moved out of overbought territory on February 03, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 38 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 30 of the 38 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 79%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for SGRY turned negative on April 06, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 52 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 43 of the 52 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where SGRY declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

SGRY broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 01, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.
